name: io.github.bjornj12/trackman-mcp
description: Fetch your Trackman Golf stats (handicap, rounds, shots, club gapping) as MCP tools.

environmentVariables.name: TRACKMAN_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bearer access token captured from an authenticated Trackman portal session. Optional if you have run `trackman-mcp login` (the server then loads the cached token automatically).
